records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it sounds to me like it could replace a ship's Eternium Drive entirely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that's an excellent idea!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that's an excellent idea!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that's an excellent idea!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quick judgment is a pirate's lifeline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quick judgment is a pirate's lifeline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quick judgment is a pirate's lifeline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I've heard Alphatrix's President is a genius in multiple fields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I've heard Alphatrix's President is a genius in multiple fields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I've heard Alphatrix's President is a genius in multiple fields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I'd like you to serve as Front Bay's temporary shipwright. Would you be willing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I'd like you to serve as Front Bay's temporary shipwright. Would you be willing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I'd like you to serve as Front Bay's temporary shipwright. Would you be willing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A shipwright...? Fufu, if that's what you'd like, Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A shipwright...? Fufu, if that's what you'd like, Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A shipwright...? Fufu, if that's what you'd like, Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then would you come with me to our shipyard first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then would you come with me to our shipyard first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then would you come with me to our shipyard first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should take advantage of that Factory Ship's help as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should take advantage of that Factory Ship's help as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should take advantage of that Factory Ship's help as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You heard him, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You heard him, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You heard him, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Doctor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Doctor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Doctor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-Doctor...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-Doctor...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-Doctor...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hacked Front Bay's database and examined each sector's shipyards.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hacked Front Bay's database and examined each sector's shipyards.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hacked Front Bay's database and examined each sector's shipyards.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the shipbuilding level of this city, no vessel could withstand the Track Switcher's output.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the shipbuilding level of this city, no vessel could withstand the Track Switcher's output.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the shipbuilding level of this city, no vessel could withstand the Track Switcher's output.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you are building will be no exception.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you are building will be no exception.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you are building will be no exception.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not something I care to hear from a criminal of the Dark Council.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not something I care to hear from a criminal of the Dark Council.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not something I care to hear from a criminal of the Dark Council.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare a space where the Colossus Base can anchor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare a space where the Colossus Base can anchor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare a space where the Colossus Base can anchor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you're building is required for my evolution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you're building is required for my evolution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>thing</color> you're building is required for my evolution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please listen to the Doctor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please listen to the Doctor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please listen to the Doctor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will certainly benefit your plan, Senior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will certainly benefit your plan, Senior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will certainly benefit your plan, Senior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avery. It's too dangerous here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avery. It's too dangerous here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avery. It's too dangerous here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if this spaceship or whatever it is could save us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if this spaceship or whatever it is could save us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if this spaceship or whatever it is could save us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But someone's in danger, and you're telling me we should tuck our tails and run?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But someone's in danger, and you're telling me we should tuck our tails and run?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But someone's in danger, and you're telling me we should tuck our tails and run?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We came here clinging to even the slightest hope, didn't we?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We came here clinging to even the slightest hope, didn't we?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We came here clinging to even the slightest hope, didn't we?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We knew people might die or get hurt coming in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We knew people might die or get hurt coming in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We knew people might die or get hurt coming in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Try to think realistically, Bonny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Try to think realistically, Bonny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Try to think realistically, Bonny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly give my life for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly give my life for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly give my life for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't retreat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't retreat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't retreat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have no choice but to push forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have no choice but to push forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have no choice but to push forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Try to think realistically, Bonny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Try to think realistically, Bonny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Try to think realistically, Bonny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know you and Avery both want to save people, but this is far too dangerous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Many of our crew were injured just getting here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we all die in this place, who will protect the people on land?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that's exactly why we can't retreat, Read.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to stand on the sacrifices already made and find a way to overcome the Black Flood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If, at the end of this journey, ending the Black Flood requires my life...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly give my life for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly give my life for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly give my life for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't retreat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't retreat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't retreat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have no choice but to push forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have no choice but to push forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have no choice but to push forward.
